sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_format(id INTEGER, value TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_format VALUES (1, format('Record number {} with value {}', 1, 'A'));
UPDATE test_format SET value = format('Updated value for record {}', id) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, format('ID: {}, Value: {}', id, value) AS formatted_output FROM test_format;
CREATE TABLE summary AS SELECT id, format('Summary of ID: {}', id) AS summary_text FROM test_format;
